name: Insurance Australia Group Limited
analysis: IAG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$7.8700, stop A$7.4349, target A$9.1753 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
